name: Nuclear, Biological and Chemical (NBC) Weapons
description: The use of NBC weapons are in the possible arsenals of international terrorists and it must be a consideration. Terrorist use of a “dirty bomb” — is considered far more likely than use of a traditional nuclear explosive device. This may be a combination of conventional explosive device with radioactive / chemical / biological material and be designed to scatter lethal and sub-lethal amounts of material over a wide area.
